namingRules: Use names such as chevron-right.png, info.png, close.png, check.png, warning.png, settings.png.
Only place icons here after they are reused by more than one page or component.
styleRules: Shared icons should be plain and reusable.
Use one icon family where possible.
Keep stroke width, corner radius, and visual weight consistent.
Do not put page-specific meaning into common icons.
